Actions.Text: REFERRED TO CIVIL SERVICE AND PENSIONS

Title: Grants retroactive membership in the New York state and local police and fire retirement system to Cansu Zaim
Summary: Grants retroactive tier V membership in the New York state and local police and fire retirement system to Cansu Zaim.
ActClause: AN ACT granting retroactive membership in the New York state and local police and fire retirement system to Cansu Zaim
